name: Stuffed Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 cups wild rice (mix of black japonica, brown, and long grain white)
recipeInstructions:
1. In the apple cider, sauté onion and garlic until soft.
2. Add rice, raisins, and more cider. Heat gently for a few minutes to let flavors meld.
3. Core cabbage and plunge leaves into hot water for 5 minutes to loosen them.
4. Peel off several cabbage leaves.
5. Place a layer of sauce in the bottom of a pan.
6. Roll the cabbage leaves around the rice mixture, putting a tablespoon or so in the middle, folding up the sides and rolling.
7. Add rolled cabbage on top of the sauce, repeating as needed.
8. Cover with sauce and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
Tangy Tomato Sauce
